lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਮੰਨੇ ਆਪਿ ਸੋਈ ਮਾਨੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: jis no mane aap soee maaneeai |
lines.english: Those whom You approve, are approved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਗਟ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ਸਭ ਠਾਈ ਜਾਨੀਐ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: pragatt purakh paravaan sabh tthaaee jaaneeai |3|
lines.english: Such a celebrated and honored person is known everywhere. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਨਸੁ ਰੈਣਿ ਆਰਾਧਿ ਸਮੑਾਲੇ ਸਾਹ ਸਾਹ ॥
lines.translit: dinas rain aaraadh samaale saah saah |
lines.english: Day and night, with every breath to worship and adore the Lord

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸ੍ਰਬ ਠਾਇ ਹਮਾਰਾ ਖਸਮੁ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: poor rahiaa srab tthaae hamaaraa khasam soe |
lines.english: He, my Lord Master, is fully pervading all places.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕੀ ਲੋਚਾ ਪੂਰਿ ਸਚੇ ਪਾਤਿਸਾਹ ॥੪॥੬॥੧੦੮॥
lines.translit: naanak kee lochaa poor sache paatisaah |4|6|108|
lines.english: - please, O True Supreme King, fulfill this, Nanak's desire. ||4||6||108||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਉ ਰਾਖੁ ਰਾਖਣਹਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jiau bhaavai tiau raakh raakhanahaariaa |
lines.english: As it pleases Your Will, please save me, O Savior Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੁ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸਿਰਿ ਛਤੁ ਦੂਜਾ ਨਾਹਿ ਕੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ek saahib sir chhat doojaa naeh koe |1|
lines.english: He is the One Lord Master, the roof over our heads; there is no other than Him. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਝ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ਨਦਰਿ ਨਿਹਾਰਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tujh bin avar na koe nadar nihaariaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Without You, my eyes see no other at all. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲੇ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਪਿ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਸਾਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: pratipaale prabh aap ghatt ghatt saareeai |
lines.english: God Himself is the Cherisher; He takes care of each and every heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਮਨਿ ਵੁਠਾ ਆਪਿ ਤਿਸੁ ਨ ਵਿਸਾਰੀਐ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jis man vutthaa aap tis na visaareeai |2|
lines.english: That person, within whose mind You Yourself dwell, never forgets You. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰੇ ਸੁ ਆਪਿ ਆਪਣ ਭਾਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jo kichh kare su aap aapan bhaaniaa |
lines.english: He does that which is pleasing to Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਾ ਕਾ ਸਹਾਈ ਜੁਗਿ ਜੁਗਿ ਜਾਣਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: bhagataa kaa sahaaee jug jug jaaniaa |3|
lines.english: He is known as the help and support of His devotees, throughout the ages. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪਿ ਜਪਿ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਝੂਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: jap jap har kaa naam kade na jhooreeai |
lines.english: Chanting and meditating up the Lord's Name, the mortal never comes to regret anything.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦਰਸ ਪਿਆਸ ਲੋਚਾ ਪੂਰੀਐ ॥੪॥੭॥੧੦੯॥
lines.translit: naanak daras piaas lochaa pooreeai |4|7|109|
lines.english: O Nanak, I thirst for the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan; please, fulfill my desire, O Lord. ||4||7||109||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਸੋਵਹਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿ ਗਾਫਲ ਗਹਿਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: kiaa soveh naam visaar gaafal gahiliaa |
lines.english: Why are you sleeping, and forgetting the Name, O careless and foolish mortal?

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੋਹਿਥੜਾ ਹਰਿ ਚਰਣ ਮਨ ਚੜਿ ਲੰਘੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: bohitharraa har charan man charr langheeai |
lines.english: O mortal, get aboard the boat of the Lord's Lotus Feet, and cross over.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਤਂ‍ੀ ਇਤੁ ਦਰੀਆਇ ਵੰਞਨੑਿ ਵਹਦਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kitanee it dareeae vanyana vahadiaa |1|
lines.english: So many have been washed away and carried off by this river of life. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗੀਐ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aatth pehar gun gaae saadhoo sangeeai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Twenty-four hours a day, sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੋਗਹਿ ਭੋਗ ਅਨੇਕ ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਸੁੰਞਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhogeh bhog anek vin naavai sunyiaa |
lines.english: You may enjoy various pleasures, but they are useless without the Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਬਿਨਾ ਮਰਿ ਮਰਿ ਰੁੰਨਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har kee bhagat binaa mar mar runiaa |2|
lines.english: Without devotion to the Lord, you shall die in sorrow, again and again. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਿਮਰਨ ਤਨੁ ਛਾਰੁ ਸਰਪਰ ਚਾਲਣਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: bin simaran tan chhaar sarapar chaalanaa |3|
lines.english: but without the meditative remembrance of the Lord, your body shall surely turn to dust, and you shall have to depart. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਪੜ ਭੋਗ ਸੁਗੰਧ ਤਨਿ ਮਰਦਨ ਮਾਲਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: kaparr bhog sugandh tan maradan maalanaa |
lines.english: You may dress and eat and apply scented oils to your body,

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾ ਬਿਖਮੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ਵਿਰਲੈ ਪੇਖਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: mahaa bikham sansaar viralai pekhiaa |
lines.english: How very treacherous is this world-ocean; how very few realize this!

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੂਟਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਸਰਣਿ ਲੇਖੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਲੇਖਿਆ ॥੪॥੮॥੧੧੦॥
lines.translit: chhoottan har kee saran lekh naanak lekhiaa |4|8|110|
lines.english: Salvation rests in the Lord's Sanctuary; O Nanak, this is your pre-ordained destiny. ||4||8||110||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਆਧਾਰੁ ਭਉਜਲੁ ਤਰਬੀਐ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ek naam aadhaar bhaujal tarabeeai |1|
lines.english: With the Support of the One Name, this terrible world-ocean is crossed over. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਇ ਨ ਕਿਸ ਹੀ ਸੰਗਿ ਕਾਹੇ ਗਰਬੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: koe na kis hee sang kaahe garabeeai |
lines.english: No one is anyone's companion; why take any pride in others?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਗਰੀਬ ਸਚੁ ਟੇਕ ਤੂੰ ਮੇਰੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: mai gareeb sach ttek toon mere satigur poore |
lines.english: You are the True Support of me, the poor mortal, O my Perfect True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਖਿ ਤੁਮੑਾਰਾ ਦਰਸਨੋ ਮੇਰਾ ਮਨੁ ਧੀਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dekh tumaaraa darasano meraa man dheere |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Gazing upon the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan, my mind is encouraged. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਨੁ ਆਧਾਰੁ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਏਹੁ ਧਨੋੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har keeratan aadhaar nihachal ehu dhano |2|
lines.english: The Kirtan of the Lord's Praise is my Support; this wealth is everlasting. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਜੁ ਮਾਲੁ ਜੰਜਾਲੁ ਕਾਜਿ ਨ ਕਿਤੈ ਗਨੋੁ ॥
lines.translit: raaj maal janjaal kaaj na kitai gano |
lines.english: Royal powers, wealth, and worldly involvements are of no use at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਤੇ ਮਾਇਆ ਰੰਗ ਤੇਤ ਪਛਾਵਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jete maaeaa rang tet pachhaaviaa |
lines.english: As many as are the pleasures of Maya, so many are the shadows they leave.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਗੁਣੀ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਤੂੰ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਗਹਿਰ ਗੰਭੀਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa gunee nidhaan toon prabh gahir ganbheere |
lines.english: You are the True Lord, the treasure of excellence; O God, You are deep and unfathomable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਗਾਵਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sukh kaa naam nidhaan guramukh gaaviaa |3|
lines.english: The Gurmukhs sing of the Naam, the treasure of peace. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸ ਭਰੋਸਾ ਖਸਮ ਕਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੇ ਜੀਅਰੇ ॥੪॥੯॥੧੧੧॥
lines.translit: aas bharosaa khasam kaa naanak ke jeeare |4|9|111|
lines.english: The Lord Master is the hope and support of Nanak's mind. ||4||9||111||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਦੁਖੁ ਜਾਇ ਸਹਜ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: jis simarat dukh jaae sehaj sukh paaeeai |
lines.english: Remembering Him, suffering is removed, and celestial peace is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸੋਇ ਜਿਸ ਕਾ ਸਭੁ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak kaa prabh soe jis kaa sabh koe |
lines.english: He alone is Nanak's God, unto whom all beings belong.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੈਣਿ ਦਿਨਸੁ ਕਰ ਜੋੜਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਈਐ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: rain dinas kar jorr har har dhiaaeeai |1|
lines.english: Night and day, with your palms pressed together, meditate on the Lord, Har, Har. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਰਹਿਆ ਭਰਪੂਰਿ ਸਚਾ ਸਚੁ ਸੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sarab rahiaa bharapoor sachaa sach soe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He is totally pervading everywhere, the Truest of the True. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਹਾਈ ਗਿਆਨ ਜੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: antar baahar sang sahaaee giaan jog |
lines.english: Inwardly and outwardly, He is my companion and my helper; He is the One to be realized.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਖਨਹਾਰੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ਰਾਖੈ ਅਗਨਿ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: raakhanahaar apaar raakhai agan maeh |
lines.english: The Savior Lord is infinite; He saves us from the fire of the womb.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸਹਿ ਅਰਾਧਿ ਮਨਾ ਬਿਨਾਸੈ ਸਗਲ ਰੋਗੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tiseh araadh manaa binaasai sagal rog |2|
lines.english: Adoring Him, my mind is cured of all its ailments. ||2||
